title: Raising €100m for research in Europe is still very challenging, warns biotech chief [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The Biotech Act can help create a new confidence, proving that Europe wants to remain competitive in biotechnology, says Belgian life sciences leader Frédéric Druck
summary_public: The Biotech Act can help create a new confidence, proving that Europe wants to remain competitive in biotechnology, says Belgian life sciences leader Frédéric Druck

BE.label: positive
BE.evidence: Europe wants to remain competitive in biotechnology
